title: Control Layer Assignment
description: Maps an assembly to a control-layer function and tracks continuity status. Records which control layer an assembly addresses and whether it is continuous, interrupted, terminated, or transitioned.

assembly_ref.description: Reference to the assembly_system this assignment belongs to.

control_layer_id.description: Control layer function assigned. References shared/control_layers.json.

continuity_status.description: Whether the control layer is maintained continuously within this assembly.
